description:
As an IT Team Lead, create a knowledge base by organizing technical discussions from your inbox (50 items) into three folders named 'KB-Security', 'KB-Linux', and 'KB-Development', ensuring at least 5 relevant emails are moved into each. Document the organization in a text file at '~/Documents/kb_index.txt' listing the categories, the count of emails in each, and a brief list of topics covered. Finally, draft an email to 'it-team@company.com' with the subject 'New Knowledge Base' announcing the completion of the extraction and the total number of articles archived.

Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
